systems.system_notes: Humeral intramedullary nailing platform listed in official DePuy Synthes trauma accompanying product information.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials list a dedicated Expert Humeral Nailing System surgical technique and associated instrumentation workflow.

components.component_notes: Primary humeral nail component described by the Expert Humeral Nailing System technique listing.
The Expert humeral construct uses locking fixation options as part of the nail system.
End-cap compatibility is part of the Expert humeral nail construct family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official source confirms the Expert Humeral Nailing System but this pass does not include a sterile implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, inventory control form, or catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
